scores.correctness_notes: Core pattern is fully correct: temp_model fixture, juju.deploy(), juju.wait() with combined all_active+all_agents_idle lambda, successes/timeout params all match gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several items not in gold standard: juju.integrate() (plausible but unverified), app.is_active attribute used in assertions, delay parameter in juju.wait(), and multiple named deploy() params (channel, num_units, config, trust, revision) not mentioned in gold. Minor risk items rather than clearly invented APIs.
